name: luna snow
bio: Equal parts pop star and Super Hero, Luna Snow puts on a dazzling show with both her light and dark ice powers. The arena is her stage, where Seol Hee and her team orchestrate spectacular displays that earn her an ever-increasing number of fans and wins.
lore:
Luna Snow is more than just another K-Pop superstar. She's also a symbol of hope for her entire generation. Using her ice powers to keep tensions across the world cool, Luna has become a musical diplomat, ready to face any conflict that may arise.
Tragedy nearly struck during Luna Snow's summer concert when a wounded Atlantean creature caused a devastating tsunami. Luna's ice held back the rushing tide and helped to heal the beast's injuries. She singlehandedly saved countless lives and prevented the situation from escalating into a full-scale conflict between South Korea and the world beneath the waves.

abilities.name: Smooth Skate
abilities.description: Keep moving forward to start ice skating and enable higher jumps.

abilities.name: Light & Dark Ice
abilities.description: Fire ice shots that damage enemies or heal allies.

additional_fields.Damage: 22 damage per round, for a total of 66 damage
additional_fields.Casting: A triple shot that hits instantly
additional_fields.Fire Rate: 0.5s for three shots. The interval between the first two shots is 0.05s
additional_fields.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 70% at 40m
additional_fields.Healing Amount: 22 health per round, for a total of 66 health

abilities.name: Ice Arts
abilities.description: Fire ice shards for a short duration, damaging enemies or healing allies while restoring her own Health. Participating in a KO reduces the cooldown of <Orange>Ice Arts</>.

additional_fields.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 1m and a height of 40m
additional_fields.Casting: Single-cast spell field that pierces through enemies
additional_fields.Special Effect: Replace the previous Light & Dark Ice cast

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.description: Cast a clump of ice to <Debuff>Freeze</> the hit enemy and restore Health. Landing a hit grants <Buff>Bonus Health</>.

additional_fields.Special Effect: Freeze enemies for 2.7s. However, if they are attacked during the last 2.2s of the freeze, the effect will be canceled. Grants 50 Bonus Health per enemy hit

abilities.name: Share The Stage
abilities.description: Attach <Orange>Idol Aura</> to an ally. Allies with <Orange>Idol Aura</> also restore Health when Luna Snow is healing others.

additional_fields.Special Effect: Provide healing to allies marked with Idol Aura; Reduce Ice Arts cooldown by 2s whenever a hero with Idol Aura takes part in a KO

abilities.name: Idol Aura
abilities.description: Automatically restore Health when casting <Orange>Ice Arts</> or <Orange>Absolute Zero</>.

abilities.name: Fate Of Both Worlds
abilities.description: Take center stage and start dancing! Toggle between two performances: Heal allies or grant them <Buff>Damage Boost</>.

additional_fields.Casting: Persistent spell field that surrounds the caster

abilities.name: Frozen Chi
abilities.description: Iron Fist channels the Chi of Shou-Lao into Luna Snow, transforming her ice power into a Chi-infused frosty ring that radiates from her. This ring can launch up enemies with chilling damage and applies a slowing effect, while simultaneously healing her allies.

abilities.name: Winter's Chill
abilities.description: Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Iron Fist and Emma Frost. When Iron Fist activates <Orange>Harmony Recovery</>, he can heal nearby allies with <Orange>Lunar Chi</>. Emma Frost can project ice energy forward, dealing damage and <Debuff>slowing</> enemies. She can also enhance her diamond form, condensing frost into an <Orange>Iced Out Diamond</> barrier that blocks enemy attacks and movement.

abilities.name: Spirit Fox Accord
abilities.description: White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of <Buff>speed</> and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying <Debuff>Charm</> to enemies.
